description: You are a constellation operator orchestrating synchronized commands across the satellite fleet. Perform a fleet commanding audit for the 'INST' and 'INST2' targets using OpenC3 COSMOS. Verify command execution by recording the 'CMD_ACPT_CNT' from the 'HEALTH_STATUS' telemetry packet before and after sending a valid command (e.g., 'COLLECT' with 'TYPE' 'NORMAL') to each target. Generate a structured JSON report at '/home/ga/Desktop/fleet_command_report.json' containing the 'execution_timestamp' (ISO 8601) and a 'fleet_status' array. Each object in the array must include the 'target' name, 'initial_cmd_acpt_cnt', 'final_cmd_acpt_cnt', 'delta' (final - initial), and a 'verified' boolean (true if delta >= 1). OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
